topics.title: Stock Market Volatility and Current Events
topics.summary: The show discusses the recent stock market decline attributed to international factors, the political situation in Iraq and Afghanistan, and various listener feedback regarding pop culture figures.

topics.title: Howard Stern Engagement and Movie Trivia
topics.summary: The studio discusses Howard Stern's engagement to Beth Ostrovsky, the logistics of his previous marriage, and plays a game identifying movie scenes while debating the use of certain language.

topics.title: Pop Culture and Religious Experiences
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion on classic film scenes from The Jerk and The Godfather, personal anecdotes regarding the rigors of Catholic school, and reactions to celebrity media segments.

topics.title: Interview with Former Weatherman Lloyd Lindsay Young
topics.summary: The studio hosts a call-in segment featuring former weatherman Lloyd Lindsay Young, who discusses his career in television and radio while the hosts joke about his intelligence and personal life.

topics.title: Interview with Weather Reporter Lloyd Lindsay Young
topics.summary: The studio hosts a conversation with weather reporter Lloyd Lindsay Young regarding his career, personal life, and performance on various trivia questions.

topics.title: Radio Show Segment with Gary
topics.summary: The studio prepares a series of comedic bits and interactions for a guest named Gary, including a repetitive greeting sequence and a mock dating scenario.

topics.title: Gary's Birthday Celebration and Guest Appearances
topics.summary: The studio hosts a series of scripted segments for Gary's birthday featuring various characters including a representation of President Bush, Jesus, Abraham Lincoln, Osama bin Laden, and the Retarded Flu.

topics.title: Gary's Birthday Celebration and Guest Interviews
topics.summary: The studio hosts a birthday celebration for Gary, featuring interviews with two women who are revealed to be men in disguise.

topics.title: Talker Magazine Influence Rankings
topics.summary: The studio critiques a list of influential talk radio personalities from Talkers magazine, dismissing the rankings as nonsensical and based on inflated egos rather than actual listenership.

topics.title: Bachelor Party Planning and Gary Garber Discussion
topics.summary: The studio discusses the logistics of an upcoming bachelor party, including a humorous role for an assistant, before transitioning to a discussion about Gary Garber's career and his interview with Kevin Sorbo.

topics.title: Hollywood Rumors and Studio Scandals
topics.summary: The show features a discussion on Ben Affleck's career, an interview with Gary Busey regarding his sobriety, and a segment on internal studio rumors involving staff members.

topics.title: Legal Disputes and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio discusses high-profile divorce settlements involving NFL players, the authenticity of leaked photos involving an American Idol contestant, and various listener inquiries regarding sports facts and personal relationships.

topics.title: News Reports and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of news stories including a self-mutilation incident in Oregon, the legal battles surrounding Anna Nicole Smith's remains, DNA testing for James Brown's estate, and Bob Woodruff's recovery from war injuries.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio discusses various pop culture topics including the Academy Awards, celebrity endorsements, upcoming television shows, and Forbes' list of high-earning young actors.
